# Vehicle Lock/Unlock Custom | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/s4-resources/s4-flipper-hack-tool/vehicle-lock-unlock-custom.md)
.

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/s4-resources/s4-flipper-hack-tool/vehicle-lock-unlock-custom#integrating-the-vehicle-lock-unlock-function-with-a-different-script)

🚗 Integrating the Vehicle Lock/Unlock Function with a Different Script


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

> If you are using a **different vehicle script** and want to integrate its lock/unlock functionality, you only need to edit the section highlighted below.

📌 **File Path:** `templates.lua`

📌 **Line:** `373`

📌 **Function:**

Copy

    Templates.Action["Vehicle lock/unlock"] = function()
    
        local playerPed = PlayerPedId()
        local playerCoords = GetEntityCoords(playerPed)
        local vehicle = GetClosestVehicle(playerCoords, 5.0, 0, 71)
    
        if vehicle then
            local lockStatus = GetVehicleDoorLockStatus(vehicle)
    
            if lockStatus == 2 then
                SetVehicleDoorsLocked(vehicle, 1)
                SetVehicleDoorsLockedForAllPlayers(vehicle, false)
                Notify("Vehicle unlocked", "success", 5000)
    
                local plate = GetVehicleNumberPlateText(vehicle)
                TriggerEvent('qb-vehiclekeys:client:AddKeys', plate)
    
                -- 🔧 INSERT YOUR CUSTOM SCRIPT FUNCTIONS HERE
                -- Example:
                -- exports["s4-vehiclekeys"]:unlockVehicle(vehicle)
    
            else
                SetVehicleDoorsLocked(vehicle, 2)
                SetVehicleDoorsLockedForAllPlayers(vehicle, true)
                Notify("Vehicle locked", "error", 5000)
            end
        end
    
    end

💡 **Notes:**

*   After the line `TriggerEvent('qb-vehiclekeys:client:AddKeys', plate)`, you can insert your own `TriggerEvent` or `exports` call to integrate your custom lock/unlock system.
    
*   This allows the locking and unlocking feature to work seamlessly with your own vehicle script.
    

[PreviousS4 Flipper Hack Tool](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/s4-resources/s4-flipper-hack-tool)
[NextCustom Dispatches](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/s4-resources/s4-flipper-hack-tool/custom-dispatches)

Last updated 9 months ago

Setup for QB Inventories


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    electrocuff = { name = 'electrocuff', label = 'Electro Cuffs', weight = 100, type = 'item', image = 'electrocuff.png', unique = false, useable = true, shouldClose = true, combinable = nil, description = 'Electro Cuffs'},
    electrocufftracker = { name = 'electrocufftracker', label = 'Electro Cuff Tracker', weight = 100, type = 'item',  image = 'electrocufftracker.png',  unique = false,useable = true, shouldClose = true, combinable = nil, description = 'Electro Cuff Tracker'},

    mouthtape = {name = 'mouthtape', label = 'Mouth Tape', weight = 100, type = 'item', image = 'mouthtape.png', unique = false, useable = true, shouldClose = true, combinable = nil, description = 'Mouth Tape'},

Copy

    local handsUp = false
    
    RegisterCommand(Config.HandsUp.command, function()
        local ped = PlayerPedId()
        if not HasAnimDictLoaded('missminuteman_1ig_2') then
            RequestAnimDict('missminuteman_1ig_2')
            while not HasAnimDictLoaded('missminuteman_1ig_2') do
                Wait(10)
            end
        end
        handsUp = not handsUp
        if exports['0r-handcuffs']:isHandcuffed() then return end
        if handsUp then
            TaskPlayAnim(ped, 'missminuteman_1ig_2', 'handsup_base', 8.0, 8.0, -1, 50, 0, false, false, false)
            exports['qb-smallresources']:addDisableControls(Config.HandsUp.controls)
        else
            ClearPedTasks(ped)
            exports['qb-smallresources']:removeDisableControls(Config.HandsUp.controls)
        end
    end, false)
    
    RegisterKeyMapping(Config.HandsUp.command, 'Hands Up', 'keyboard', Config.HandsUp.keybind)
    exports('getHandsup', function() return handsUp end)

Copy

    start es_extended
    start 0r-core
    start 0r_handcuffs_remake
    --- esx resources --

Copy

    start qb-core
    start 0r-core
    start 0r_handcuffs_remake
    --- qbcore resources --

# 0R - Garbage V2 | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0r-resources/0r-garbage-v2.md)
.

This script is intended for ESX, QBCore, and Qbox based servers.

Copy

    author '0resmon & alikoc.dev'

Copy

    dependencies { 'ox_lib', 'oxmysql', '0r_lib' }

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0r-resources/0r-garbage-v2#overview)

Overview


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

`0r-garbage-v2` is a progression-based garbage job with multiple scenarios, route pools, garbage bag loot, freelance cleaning, and configurable menu access.

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0r-resources/0r-garbage-v2#start-here)

Start Here


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Setup and Items](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0r-resources/0r-garbage-v2/setup-and-items)
[Script Integrations](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0r-resources/0r-garbage-v2/integrations)
[FAQ and Troubleshooting](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0r-resources/0r-garbage-v2/faq)
[Configuration](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0r-resources/0r-garbage-v2/configuration)

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0r-resources/0r-garbage-v2#important-notes)

Important Notes


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Main config files: `config/main.lua` and `config/job.lua`
    
*   Player profile SQL is created automatically by `modules/mysql/server.lua`
    
*   Default menu tablet item: `garbage_tablet`
    
*   Default bag prop assets are streamed by the resource and `fxmanifest.lua` includes `stream/qua_binbags.ytyp`
    
*   Scenario cooldowns are defined in `config/job.lua`, but they can be bypassed globally with `Config.BypassCooldown` in `config/main.lua`

# S4 Illegal Caravan | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/illegal-caravan.md)
.

Take your operations on the road with our fully customizable Meth Lab Caravan! This isn’t just any regular mobile setup – it’s an advanced, feature-packed vehicle designed to enhance your production while keeping you under the radar.

Cook, Crack, and Package – All in One Place

Transform your caravan into a fully functional meth lab where you can cook, crack, and package high-quality product. However, this process is not as simple as it seems – you’ll need to manage essential resources like energy and water to keep your operations running smoothly.

Customizable Features for Maximum Efficiency

Set yourself apart from other caravans by upgrading your mobile lab with a range of premium features. Each enhancement not only adds convenience but also provides additional benefits to your operation.

🔹 CCTV System – Keep an eye on your surroundings and stay one step ahead of potential threats. 🔹 Noise Pollution Prevention Filter – Reduce the sound of your operations to avoid attracting unwanted attention. 🔹 Soundproofing System – Additional sound insulation to ensure your activities remain undetected. 🔹 Extra Stashes – Increase storage capacity for your materials and finished product. 🔹 Solar Panel – Maintain a sustainable power source and reduce dependency on external energy supplies.

Each of these features provides tangible benefits, whether it’s enhancing security, improving efficiency, or reducing operational risks.

Stay Alert, Stay Smart

Cooking meth in this caravan isn’t just about following simple steps – it requires careful management. You must monitor your energy and water levels and replenish them regularly to avoid disruptions. Additionally, be cautious of noise levels! If the decibels get too high, law enforcement might catch wind of your illicit activities.

Are you ready to take your mobile meth lab to the next level? Invest in the best caravan setup and dominate the market while staying ahead of the game!

[Previousitem list](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/tactical-diving/item-list)
[NextAdaptations](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/illegal-caravan/adaptations)

Last updated 5 months ago

# fps drop | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/s4-resources/s4-carcontrol-v2/fps-drop.md)
.

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/s4-resources/s4-carcontrol-v2/fps-drop#fps-optimization-s4-control)

FPS Optimization (s4-control)


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you are experiencing performance issues or low FPS while using s4-control, please follow the steps below to optimize your FiveM settings.

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/s4-resources/s4-carcontrol-v2/fps-drop#optimization-steps)

Optimization Steps

1.  Access Settings: Click on the Gear icon (Settings) located in the top-right corner of the FiveM main menu.
    
2.  Navigate to Game Tab: On the left-hand sidebar, click on the "Game" category.
    
3.  Enable GPU Scaling: Find the "NUI in-process GPU" option and toggle it to Enabled (checked).
    
4.  Restart: Restart your FiveM client for the changes to take effect.
    

Why this works: Enabling this feature allows the FiveM UI (NUI) to be processed directly by your GPU, reducing the overhead on your CPU and significantly improving in-game FPS.

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/s4-resources/s4-carcontrol-v2/fps-drop#this-is-explained-in-the-images-below)

This is explained in the images below;


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FHipxjGMjwhD9kS6BWDkT%252FEkran%2520g%25C3%25B6r%25C3%25BCnt%25C3%25BCs%25C3%25BC%25202026-03-03%2520202053.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D8b88a7ea-e1af-48a0-bc4a-93d76bb4f524&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=47f62b80&sv=2)

# S4 Illegal Phone | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/illegal-phone.md)
.

Are you ready for an unparalleled experience on your server? Presenting a true “game changer”: the next-generation Burner Phone system.

What Does It Offer?

*   Dark Chat & Secret Trade: Step into the dark market with real players.
    
    Secret Codes & Coordinates: Find special codes hidden at specific locations to access covert markets.
    
*   Bombs & Remote Detonation: Everything is at your fingertips—enter the code and detonate! Take your heists to the next level with strategic explosions.
    
*   Undetectable Number Switching: Numbers change automatically at intervals you set, leaving the police unable to track you!
    
*   Limitless Integration: Easily adapt it to your own systems or integrate with other scripts.
    
*   Calling Feature on Supported Servers: If your main phone system is compatible, make calls to other phones and craft extraordinary RP scenarios. With this script, action-packed operations, heists, secret deals, and so much more on your server will be elevated to a whole new level. Looking for privacy? Switch your number with a single click and vanish without a trace. Want to detonate a bomb? Unlock the codes and trigger it remotely. Plus, you can customize every feature to match your server’s rules, tailoring the RP experience to your vision.
    

If you’re ready to bring a fresh adventure to your server, don’t miss out on the most comprehensive Burner Phone script! Take your roleplay scene to new heights and give your players an unforgettable experience!

[PreviousConfig Var's](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/s4-time/config-vars)
[NextInstalling, Faq & Features](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/illegal-phone/installing-faq-and-features)

Last updated 5 months ago

# Features | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-waypoint/features.md)
.

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-waypoint/features#features-and-usage)

Features & Usage


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The **Dynamic 3D Waypoint Navigation System** is designed to provide players with a seamless, immersive, and high-performance routing experience on their screen without relying on standard mini-maps.

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-waypoint/features#id-1.-intelligent-3d-path-indicators)

1\. Intelligent 3D Path Indicators

When a player sets a destination on their pause map, the system automatically projects beautiful, dynamic 3D directional markers (chevrons) directly on the game world road. These indicators adapt to the player's speed, distance, and the curvature of the road, giving them a real-time visual guide straight to their target.

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-waypoint/features#id-2.-advanced-player-hud)

2\. Advanced Player HUD

The system includes customizable on-screen overlays perfectly integrated into gameplay:

*   **Floating Directional Arrow**: A dynamic compass arrow that sits comfortably in the player's view, constantly rotating towards the destination.
    
*   **Distance Meter**: A modernized tracker that calculates the remaining distance in real-time, switching seamlessly between Kilometers (KM) and Miles (MIL) based on your server configurations.
    
*   **Smart Destination Pin**: As characters approach their targets, the floating waypoint pinpoint dynamically scales and highlights their objective directly in 3D space.
    

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-waypoint/features#id-3.-total-customization-panel)

3\. Total Customization Panel

Players have complete control over what they see. Using the interaction menu (`/armenu` by default), each player can individually customize:

*   **Component Toggles**: Turn off specific modules (e.g., hide the 3D road arrows but keep the distance meter active).
    
*   **Themes & Styles**: Cycle between visually distinct styling presets like _Minimal, Radar, Classic, 3D Hover_ or _Neon_.
    
*   **Color Themes**: Adjust the accent colors of the holograms (Global Color) manually to fit their vehicle color or personal vibe.
    
*   **Drag & Drop**: Players can effortlessly drag HUD elements across their screen and adjust their sizes to ensure the navigation tools never block their view.
    

All personal preferences are saved securely in the background, meaning players will retain their customized layouts upon their next connection seamlessly.

[PreviousConfig Settings](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-waypoint/config-settings)
[NextFrkn Clean Job](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-clean-job)

    Config = {}

    Config.CriticalPerspirationLevel = 50

# Error: syntax error near '<\1>' | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/error-syntax-error-near-less-than-1-greater-than.md)
.

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/error-syntax-error-near-less-than-1-greater-than#you-lack-the-required-entitlement-to-use)

You lack the required entitlement to use

Please make sure to restart your server and verify that your server license key is accurate. If you purchased the resource on the wrong account, you can transfer it to the correct account through the keymaster platform.

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/error-syntax-error-near-less-than-1-greater-than#error-parsing--failed-to-load--syntax-error-near-1)

Error parsing / Failed to load / syntax error near 1

**This usually indicates that the escrow files have been corrupted, please follow these steps:**

*   Update your server artifacts to [latest recommended or higher(opens in a new tab)](https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_server_windows/master/)
    .
    
*   Use [WinSCP(opens in a new tab)](https://winscp.net/eng/download.php)
     instead of FileZilla
    
*   Your anticheat, disabled anticheat or delete anticheat dump lua files
    
*   After applying these, download the script again and fresh install
    

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/error-syntax-error-near-less-than-1-greater-than#failed-to-verify-protected-resource)

Failed to verify protected resource

This error usually indicates that the files were damaged or corrupted during the download process. In many cases, this occurs when using the FileZilla FTP client, which has been known to cause file corruption. We recommend switching to a different FTP client, such as **WinSCP**, to help prevent these issues.

It appears that there may have been some file corruption during the transfer process. To resolve this issue, please ensure that all hidden files are copied over, including the .fxap file that is located in a protected resource. Some FTP programs may skip these files, so it's important to use a reliable FTP client that will copy all necessary files.

* * *

**Special thanks** [**UM**](https://shop.uyuyorumstore.com/)
 **for the documentation and information <3.**

[PreviousFAQ / Errors / Questions](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/s.s.s-errors-questions)

# Weapon settings | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/bp-resources/bp-inventory/weapon-settings.md)
.

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/bp-resources/bp-inventory/weapon-settings#info-metadata-entry-for-weapon-attachments)

Info (metadata) entry for weapon attachments

You can extract the weapon as a specialised weapon with the attachment method described here.

Copy

    itemname = weapon_pistol
    amount = 1 
    info.attachment = {
     {['component'] = "flashlight"},
     {['component'] = "suppressor"}
    }
    exports['bp_inventory']:AddItem(source, item, amount, info, slot)
    

*   As you can see above, you can add automatic attacment to the weapon.
    
*   **You can find Components information in config.lua > Config.Weapons.**

# Drone App Introduction | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/drone-app-introduction.md)
.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252F16kAKBQ7ijAWIBUNipgm%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D56c9b589-2d84-488f-8ef4-8c97689febe8&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e7461399&sv=2)

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/drone-app-introduction#store-and-delivery-system-overview)

Store and Delivery System Overview

The **Store and Delivery System** allows players to order various products using Butcoin (Butc). This page functions as a virtual store where players can browse different blueprints, components, and other essential items.

**Key Features:**

1.  **Product List**:
    
    *   The store displays a list of items that players can purchase using Butcoin. Players can define the product list through configuration, giving them the flexibility to set available items as they wish.
        
    
2.  **Ordering and Payment**:
    
    *   Players select the product they want to buy and confirm the purchase using Butcoin, the in-game currency. The store's interface makes it easy for players to see what they're buying and how much they are spending.
        
    
3.  **Delivery Mechanism**:
    
    *   After placing an order, a location is marked on the map, indicating the delivery point.
        
    *   When players reach the marked location, they will encounter either an NPC (non-player character) or a drone. This NPC or drone safely delivers the ordered item and then leaves the area.
        
    
4.  **Interactive Experience**:
    
    *   This system enhances the gameplay by providing a realistic and interactive delivery process. Real-time map markers and dynamic delivery methods make the virtual world feel more immersive and engaging.
        
    

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/drone-app-introduction#summary)

Summary:

The **Store and Delivery System** offers players the opportunity to buy valuable items while improving the gameplay experience with innovative delivery methods. Combining traditional purchasing with future-forward drone deliveries, this system creates a more immersive and interactive in-game trade environment.

[PreviousMiner Extension App Introduction](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-extension-app-introduction)
[NextWallet App Introduction](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/wallet-app-introduction)

Last updated 1 year ago

# Npc Creator | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/npc-creator.md)
.

* * *

You can open it only in Club with the command in Config.NpcCreatorCommand. You can start using

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FnNH0htSqrU2DRgjWavr9%252Fresim_2024-09-23_133423471.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5dcd48db-7f78-402e-b348-4ab40853bd77&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a75b74ec&sv=2)

Npc creation controls

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/npc-creator#create)

Create

After positioning the ped correctly, you can access the creation screen by pressing ‘E’

Keys cannot be changed for the time being (Version 1.0.0)

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252F9vebEvuEbWFTfe1xtII2%252Fresim_2024-09-23_133733873.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dee75bce8-fe92-4733-b383-ed679cad53ee&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=11b10f96&sv=2)

Information about the ped

*   Name: You can name it according to the area you are positioning or according to your request. This naming is for selection in the management menu.
    
*   Model: You can choose one of the [Fivem peds](https://docs.fivem.net/docs/game-references/ped-models/)
     and put it on. Including animals. I advise you to stay away from models starting with "**cs\_"**. They can cause client-side crashes
    
*   Animation, Directory: Animation and directory information to be used. The animation usually appears as a short, clean name. There are usually characters such as @ and \_ in the directory, there are times when it does not.
    
*   Checkbox - "Should be animated":It is the check whether the ped will apply the animation or not.
    

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/npc-creator#npc-management-menu)

NPC Management Menu

The peds with the names you give will appear here. After clicking, the same dialogue as above will open again and you can make arrangements.

The position of a previously created ped cannot be changed. It must be deleted and recreated.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FRTMl509OFt2LmLmCfrcm%252Fresim_2024-09-23_134719148.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1881e84f-551b-43ec-9416-3924c83d9c40&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=7b289e04&sv=2)

.

Yes, there is a file and a table. You can organise it according to your language.

Go to wais-multicharacterv2/html/public/Config.json file and edit the data in languages variable according to yourself.

You need to restart the script for the changes to take effect. Comma or apostrophe errors will cause the script to stop working.

# YouTube API Stuff | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/youtube-api-stuff.md)
.

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/youtube-api-stuff#how-to-create-an-api-key)

How to create an API Key


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Go to [**Console Cloud**](https://console.cloud.google.com/)
     and sign in with your account.
    
*   Then watch the video ‘[**Creating YouTube V3 API KEY**](https://youtu.be/uz7dY8qTFJw?t=20)
    ’.
    
*   Copy the API KEY you created and navigate to this location. **wais-club/html/public/Config.json**
    
*   Find the ‘**YOUTUBE\_API\_KEY**’ Variable and paste this into it.
    

Copy

    {
        "YOUTUBE_API_KEY": "YOUR NEW API-KEY HERE",
        "languages": {
            ...
        }
    }

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/youtube-api-stuff#api-errors)

API Errors


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Invalid API Key** => You may have entered the API KEY missing or incorrectly.
    
*   **API Key not found** => You will get this error because you have not entered or skipped the config.json file correctly.
    

* * *

**Attention!**

Do not share the keys you create with anyone. DJ Booth will give an error if you reach the usage quota.

[PreviousNpc Creator](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/npc-creator)
[NextFAQ / Errors / Questions](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/s.s.s-errors-questions)

# Dark Store App Introduction | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/page.md)
.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252F6rVezkNQfw0NAxut0dLm%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Ddaa8f50c-e2c7-47e3-9675-d23d4f48bf45&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=836fad43&sv=2)

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252F89v9dRTuWi1qfa6tx5F3%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D56f176a8-7e21-43b1-b37f-f40ab84f9c7f&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9479a40&sv=2)

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FxlLphnzVIEypvfjCdS4Z%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De3662463-37e4-4e51-8e85-ee3947522819&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6f01790f&sv=2)

**Dark Store Documentation Overview**

The _Dark Store_ serves as a central hub for acquiring essential applications that are crucial for various illicit operations. Players can access a variety of apps, each designed for a specific function within the game, ranging from hacking systems to financial management tools.

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/page#key-features-of-the-dark-store)

Key Features of the Dark Store:

1.  **Application Categories**: The Dark Store provides a categorized layout for different types of applications. Each category is displayed with its corresponding icon, allowing users to quickly navigate and select the desired application.
    
2.  **Application Purchase**: Each app is labeled with its name, description, and a corresponding price in PATC (the in-game currency). Once an app is purchased, it is marked as _Installed_ in the store.
    
3.  **Purpose of Applications**:
    
    *   **Drone App**: Enables the purchase and control of drones for surveillance or delivery tasks.
        
    *   **Wallet App**: Allows the management of digital currencies and funds.
        
    *   **PH App**: Grants access to private heists and high-level robbery operations.
        
    *   **Salty App**: Facilitates scans and network breaches.
        
    *   **Crack App**: Provides tools to break into secured systems using obtained MAC addresses and IPs.
        
    *   **Miner App**: Manages the mining of cryptocurrencies.
        
    *   **Other Specialized Apps**: Available depending on gameplay progression and requirements.
        
    

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/page#navigating-the-dark-store)

Navigating the Dark Store:

*   **Home Interface**: The Dark Store’s main screen displays the app categories with a stylized theme. Players can hover over each icon to reveal its function.
    
*   **Application Details**: Clicking on an app opens a detailed view, showing the app's description, cost, and installation status. Players must ensure they have sufficient PATC to proceed with purchases.
    

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/page#example-workflow)

Example Workflow:

To enhance gameplay, players may need to:

1.  Open the _Dark Store_ and browse through the available applications.
    
2.  Select and purchase an application, such as the _Notepad_ app for securely storing passwords.
    
3.  Confirm the transaction using the available in-game currency.
    

The _Dark Store_ provides players with the necessary resources to progress through various missions and operations, adding depth and strategic elements to the overall gameplay experience.

[PreviousSalty App Introduction](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/salty-app)
[NextMiner App Introduction](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-app-introduction)

Last updated 1 year ago

# Wallet App Introduction | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/wallet-app-introduction.md)
.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252Ffsyp9NYpJgdOvno1IuhW%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D003ab0db-69d7-4934-90d0-859d861c5ebe&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8db84f3e&sv=2)

The _Wallet App_ is a critical feature for managing and transferring in-game cryptocurrency. Here's a breakdown of its key elements and functionalities:

1.  **Account Overview**:
    
    *   The top section of the app displays your total balance in cryptocurrency units, represented as "BUTC."
        
    *   You can _send_ and _receive_ crypto assets through the dedicated buttons.
        
    
2.  **Hacking Reputation**:
    
    *   On the right side, there's a reputation system measuring your hacking skill progression. It displays the current level of reputation and the progress towards the next level.
        
    
3.  **Account Details**:
    
    *   The app shows specific details like your unique _Username_, the _MAC Address_ of the WiFi you’re attempting to hack, and the _Crypto Address_. These identifiers are essential when interacting with other users in the game.
        
    *   The _WiFi Status_ indicates your connection status, which might be required for certain actions within the app.
        
    
4.  **Transaction History**:
    
    *   A history section displays past transactions, listing the sender and receiver's usernames and addresses, the amount transferred, and other relevant details. It helps keep track of all your crypto dealings.
        
    
5.  **Sending and Receiving Crypto**:
    
    *   By selecting the _Send Crypto_ button, users can transfer BUTC to other players by specifying the target crypto address and amount.
        
    *   The _Receive Crypto_ button provides a simple way to generate and share your crypto address for others to send you currency.
        
    
    ![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FcaojDRNwChMMTk0hWXFs%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7d07e328-507f-41b3-acaf-e0bf8212d48e&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=2ef76afb&sv=2)
    

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FvmXqnq7Q8xJGHiP0rVyU%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dae203c5c-8cc1-4f4a-ade2-108c565c9a7d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=127fad0a&sv=2)

1.  **Confirmation Screens**:
    

*   The wallet includes secure transaction confirmation popups to review and finalize each operation, reducing mistakes during the transfer process.
    

This app is central to managing digital currency in your in-game operations, allowing users to send and receive cryptocurrency securely while tracking their hacking activities and reputation progress.

[PreviousDrone App Introduction](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/drone-app-introduction)
[NextNote App Introduction](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/note-app-introduction)

Last updated 1 year ago

# Kicked For Explotation | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-multicharacterv2/kicked-for-explotation.md)
.

Firstly, make sure that you have selected your **QBCore** type correctly. **New** or **Old**.

To resolve this error, firstly review your player.lua file again. Because you may have put the **event in the wrong place** or you may **not have put the data returned with return in the right place** (High Probability!)

**\=>** [**Setup Player Lua**](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-multicharacterv2/installation-qbcore)

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-multicharacterv2/kicked-for-explotation#ive-corrected-my-mistake-but-im-still-getting-kicked)

👿I've corrected my mistake but I'm still getting kicked


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The player will be kicked from the server when attempting to delete all characters created before realising this deficiency.

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-multicharacterv2/kicked-for-explotation#if-your-server-is-a-development-that-is-if-it-is-still-in-the-development-process-follow-this-way)

**If your server is a development, that is, if it is still in the development process, follow this way:**

*   Clear all rows in **players** and wais\_multicharacterv2 tables. Then restart the server.
    

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-multicharacterv2/kicked-for-explotation#if-your-server-is-used-for-an-active-role-that-is-open-to-players-follow-this-way)

**If your server is used for an active role that is open to players, follow this way:**

The result of this error will be the following. Actually, for each player who presses the create character button, 2 characters with different citizenids will be created. The citizenid of the last created character will be saved in the multicharacterv2 table.

*   Go to _**qb-core/server/player.lua**_
    
*   Search for this function and make sure you find **QBCore.Player.DeleteCharacter(source, citizenid)**
    
*   Then delete the red hatched areas below or make a comment line. To make a comment line, put -- at the beginning of the line on the left hand side.
    

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FcMG0ykWTUPObrvvrNCJ2%252FAds%25C4%25B1xz.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7f7269b0-aa7c-4a42-b949-972810f6bb7a&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=b8978d3a&sv=2)

**Red Hatcheds**

* * *

[PreviousChange Language](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-multicharacterv2/change-language)
[NextWais Bodycamv2](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-bodycamv2)

Last updated 1 year ago

*   [👿I've corrected my mistake but I'm still getting kicked](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-multicharacterv2/kicked-for-explotation#ive-corrected-my-mistake-but-im-still-getting-kicked)
    
*   [If your server is a development, that is, if it is still in the development process, follow this way:](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-multicharacterv2/kicked-for-explotation#if-your-server-is-a-development-that-is-if-it-is-still-in-the-development-process-follow-this-way)
    
*   [If your server is used for an active role that is open to players, follow this way:](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-multicharacterv2/kicked-for-explotation#if-your-server-is-used-for-an-active-role-that-is-open-to-players-follow-this-way)

. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-cargo-plane-heist/items.md)
.

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-cargo-plane-heist/items#item-configuration)

📦 Item Configuration


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You need to add the following items to your server for the script to function correctly.

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-cargo-plane-heist/items#items-image)

Items Image

155KB

[Items.zip](https://3505378470-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%2Fuploads%2FKlD9Oe4fuXZYp2fGTrFU%2FItems.zip?alt=media&token=9a9f3f9e-cf2f-432c-819f-37e448590f0f)

archive

Download[Open](https://3505378470-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%2Fuploads%2FKlD9Oe4fuXZYp2fGTrFU%2FItems.zip?alt=media&token=9a9f3f9e-cf2f-432c-819f-37e448590f0f)

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-cargo-plane-heist/items#qbcore-items)

QBCore Items

Add these lines to your `qb-core/shared/items.lua`:

Copy

    ['cargo_tablet'] 	 = { name = 'cargo_tablet', 	 label = 'Heist Tablet', 	   weight = 200, 	type = 'item', 		image = 'cargo_tablet.png', 	unique = false, 	useable = true, 	shouldClose = true,	   description = 'A tablet used to access the dark web cargo network.' },
    ['drone_control'] 	 = { name = 'drone_control', 	 label = 'Surveillance Drone', weight = 1000, 	type = 'item', 		image = 'drone_control.png', 	unique = true, 		useable = true, 	shouldClose = true,	   description = 'Remote control for a high-tech heist drone.' },
    ['parachute_heist']  = { name = 'parachute_heist', 	 label = 'Heist Parachute',    weight = 1000, 	type = 'item', 		image = 'parachute.png', 		unique = false, 	useable = true, 	shouldClose = true,	   description = 'Essential for a safe exit from the plane.' },

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-cargo-plane-heist/items#ox-inventory-items)

OX Inventory Items

Add these lines to your `ox_inventory/data/items.lua`:

Copy

    ['cargo_tablet'] = {
        label = 'Heist Tablet',
        weight = 200,
        stack = false,
        close = true,
        description = 'A tablet used to access the dark web cargo network.'
    },
    
    ['drone_control'] = {
        label = 'Surveillance Drone',
        weight = 1000,
        stack = false,
        close = true,
        description = 'Remote control for a high-tech heist drone.'
    },
    
    ['parachute_heist'] = {
        label = 'Heist Parachute',
        weight = 1000,
        stack = true,
        close = true,
        description = 'Essential for a safe exit from the plane.'
    },

# S4 Tactical Diving | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/tactical-diving.md)
.

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/tactical-diving#dive-into-adventure-introducing-0resmons-new-highly-anticipated-diving-script)

Dive into Adventure: Introducing 0Resmon's New, Highly Anticipated Diving Script!

Get ready to immerse your players in an unforgettable underwater experience with our brand-new diving script! This isn't just any script; it features **three distinct missions**, each with its own unique theme, designed to keep your players hooked and deeply engaged on your server.

Our script masterfully integrates **five essential in-game items**, making their effective use crucial for success. This strategic requirement not only elevates the challenge but also creates more opportunities for player interaction and extended playtime as they navigate the thrilling depths. Prepare for an adventure that will truly bind your community!

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/tactical-diving#essential-gear-for-deep-dives)

Essential Gear for Deep Dives

Our diving script features specialized items crucial for deep-sea exploration. Items like the **adjustable headlight**, **sonar device**, and **anchor** are vital for successful missions. You have full control over how players acquire them: list them in your in-game store, make them available in illegal shops, or even allow players to obtain them through illicit means.

Mastering these items gives players a significant advantage, leading to greater rewards. Beyond just cash, deep dives can yield **illegal items, precious metals, and valuable jewels**. The best part? **You completely customize all the rewards!**

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/tactical-diving#key-features)

Key Features:

*   **Three Unique Missions:** Each with a distinct theme for maximum player engagement.
    
*   **5 Essential Items:** Requires players to effectively use specific items, increasing challenge and replayability.
    
*   **Fully Customizable:** Missions and configurations are completely editable.
    
*   **Editable Language Files:** Seamless localization with included, editable language files.
    
*   **Plug-and-Play:** Easy setup and execution once minimum requirements are met.
    
*   **Lore & Roleplay Friendly:** Designed to seamlessly integrate into your server's narrative.
    
*   **Optimized Performance:** Resource-friendly and secure, ensuring minimal server impact.
    
*   **Customizable Rewards:** You determine all the rewards, from cash to illegal items, precious metals, and jewels.
    

More information for system (Please read before buy) :

*   This system is a standalone system, if you want to adapt it to other scripts you will have to do it yourself!
    
*   There is no extra feature other than the features mentioned. It is as you see in the video and there are no extras. It cannot be returned for any reason, such as if you think the system is different after purchase. This script is a single-player mission.

# Duty System | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-police-job/duty-system.md)
.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252Fy1nbXHHK0ZVoXfWDTGvB%252Fduty.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5e10387c-c177-46c6-9ebe-a1b73f59ca2a&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=285c3c6b&sv=2)

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-police-job/duty-system#main-features)

🔹 Main Features

1.  **Clock In / Clock Out**
    
    *   The main function is to switch between **On Duty** and **Off Duty** states.
        
    *   Pressing **Go On Duty** sets the player as active in their job.
        
    *   Pressing again switches them to **Off Duty**.
        
    
2.  **Player Information**
    
    *   Shows player name, citizen ID, and job.
        
    *   Displays current status (**On Duty / Off Duty**).
        
    *   Real-time clock is shown in the top-right corner for shift tracking.
        
    
3.  **Worker List**
    
    *   Shows all employees currently active in the same job (e.g., all on-duty police).
        
    *   Lets officers/EMS see who else is available at that moment.
        
    
4.  **History**
    
    *   Logs each duty session with timestamps.
        
    *   Example:
        
        *   Furkan Test → Police
            
        *   17:55:46 – 17:55:48 (0.0 minutes).
            
        
    *   Helps track attendance and working hours for RP or server management.
        
    

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-police-job/duty-system#workflow-example)

🔹 Workflow Example

1.  Player enters the duty management menu.
    
2.  If off duty → presses **Go On Duty**.
    
3.  System changes their status to active and logs the start time.
    
4.  Other employees can see them listed in the **Worker List**.
    
5.  When finishing work, player goes off duty → system logs the end time.
    
6.  The duty session appears in the **History** tab.
    

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-police-job/duty-system#advantages)

🔹 Advantages

*   **Transparency:** Everyone can see who’s on duty.
    
*   **Shift Tracking:** Keeps accurate records of start and end times.
    
*   **Roleplay Realism:** Simulates real police/EMS duty logs.
    
*   **Management Tool:** History can be used by high command to check activity.
    

[PreviousFingerprint System](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-police-job/fingerprint-system-1)
[NextReport System](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-police-job/report-system)

# Commands | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/bp-resources/bp-garage/commands.md)
.

*   Admins can make any person in the vehicle the owner of the vehicle.
    

Copy

    /setvehownerplayer playerid

*   Garage owners can invite their friends to use the garage.
    

Copy

    /garageinvite [add,remove,list]

for /garageinvite remove listid >> you can find list id from /garageinvite list

/garageinvite add playerid >> added player from serverid(like 1,2,3)

*   With this command, admins can create a garage.(They need to give perm via config.)
    

Copy

    /creategarage

*   Create garage for Realstate jobs
    

Copy

    /crealstate

> createpay and sellpay are in the percentile.
> 
> If Realstate builds a garage, they will give money with a 30% deduction. If one person buys it, 40% more will be refunded.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FNsqQMm9z2zUxgpg4U6MS%252Fasdsasa%25C4%25B1.JPG%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D526973d9-dbfc-4264-9b13-ea8401ac4742&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=61fe0561&sv=2)

# Spotlight Creator | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/spotlight-creator.md)
.

* * *

Within the Club, it can only be accessed by the Boss.

Can be opened with the command Command can be changed from the Config.lua file.

Copy

    Config.LightCreator = "lights" -- If the person is the boss of the club and is inside the club, the menu command that can be placed in the place and can regulate the lights

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/spotlight-creator#how-to-use)

How to use


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Specify a field by following the usage details that come after using the command.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FwJd0ntgODEMschcY7REK%252Fresim_2024-09-23_024418441.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Deae6c85d-53ed-42dd-a823-e276686912aa&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9cd965ac&sv=2)

Add Light: You need to make a 2-step marking. The first marking is the position of the light, the 2nd marking is the direction. If you complete both steps and press H, you will see the spotlight settings

Settings: You can adjust Distance, Radius and Brightness settings from this menu. Light settings can be changed later from the Light Management panel.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FcET8i2tnth67LsDsLvCx%252Fresim_2024-09-23_025223314.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D82a15e50-91ed-4298-8a30-a5d9c060724d&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c393dae7&sv=2)

Spotlight Settings

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/spotlight-creator#spotlight-management)

Spotlight Management


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Using the command you set for Config.LightCreator, you can open the menu and see or manage your previous Lights.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FbXqntWWBJ8madq7YV79T%252Fresim_2024-09-23_120113767.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D30046eb0-36c8-4aff-a8f6-b6d0cb5b83e9&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=d2ac114b&sv=2)

* * *

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/spotlight-creator#for-developers)

For Developers

The created light will only become active when entering the Club and will be automatically deleted when leaving the Polyzone area.

‘Dynamic’ Colour adjustment can increase the resmon.

# S4 Web Admin | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/s4-web-admin.md)
.

This script is intended exclusively for server owners and head administrators. It is not designed for your moderator team. Of course, if you share the login information with developers you trust, they can use it. This script is still in beta. Considering all the options and features it offers, any issues that may arise will be resolved as quickly as possible and made available for use.

This script is not suitable for Linux servers. We are issuing this warning because granting full access permissions on Linux servers or servers without machine access would be difficult for end users. If you still wish to use it, it is at your own risk.

In this script, we use an HTTP server in JavaScript to enable greater access and provide convenience. There is no escrow in Lua files except for files such as lib and bridge. All JavaScript sources are open. (Even if you obtain the script as open source)

Ports 80 and 3000 should not be used by any other program on your machine and should be open. You can easily open them using the “firewall\_rules.bat” file we provide. (Must be run as an administrator)

Script benefits (Out-of-game) • Logining (Brute force protection – basic) • Logs (General log, Gunshot, Deaths) • Live Map 3D • Live Console – with vs code editör • Player List and actions • Show Player inventories – vehicles • Ban system (In a standalone way) • Resources (start-stop-restart) • File editor – (Edit files, Create file and folders, Delete files) – widt vsCode • qrConnect – (Quick connect with iPhone & Android)

### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/s4-web-admin#script-benefits-in-game)

Script benefits (In-game)

• Manager actions: Admin Tag, Player Names, Player Skeleton (self), Announce, Revive All, Delete nearby, ID Gun, Noclip, God Mode (self), Object Mode • Players (Quick player info, Watch live players, Player Actions) • Server stats (Player count, Total bank, Total cash, Server Ram, Server Cpu usage, Total Logs) • Banlist (Basic version) • Admin chat for InGame

All Player Action List: • Revive • Heal • Explode • Kill • Spawn Vehicle • Delete Vehicle • Bring To Coord • Give Weapon • Give Item • God Mode • Freeze • Play Sound (require xsound) • Show Image Url • Give Money • Set Weather • Set Time • Kick • Ban • Message, Warn, Announce • Revive All • Clear Nearby Entities • Set Job • Repair Vehicle • Set Fuel New features will be added during the beta process if requested by the majority of our customers. Please feel free to share your ideas with us.

[Previousfps drop](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/s4-carcontrol-v2/fps-drop)
[NextInGame](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/s4-resources/s4-web-admin/ingame)

Last updated 5 months ago

# Miner Extension App Introduction | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-extension-app-introduction.md)
.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FLQcEoCoNcUzyFjBiyd9c%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dfa0ce42e-0006-437f-b50e-ba53644b008e&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=88602a4c&sv=2)

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-extension-app-introduction#miner-ext-overview)

Miner EXT Overview

The _Miner EXT_ page serves as a critical hub for connecting and managing your GPU racks to the central mining system. This section is designed to optimize the overall mining efficiency by allowing players to link multiple GPUs and view the combined mining output.

**Key Features of the Miner EXT Page:**

1.  **Mining Overview**:
    
    *   **Current Butcoin Count**: Displayed prominently at the center of the page, the amount of Butcoin currently being generated is visible in real-time. The system’s total earning capacity is updated automatically based on the linked GPUs.
        
    *   **Mining Rate**: The mining rate (e.g., 1 Butcoin per 24 hours) is prominently shown under the total Butcoin count, representing the overall mining speed derived from the linked GPU racks.
        
    
2.  **GPU Rack Management**:
    
    *   **Linking GPUs**: Each GPU rack can be individually linked to the main system by pressing the "Link" button. When linked, the rack becomes active, and its contribution to the mining speed and output is reflected in real-time.
        
    *   **Rack Status Indicators**: The page visually shows the connection status of each rack using icons and visual links. When a GPU rack is successfully linked, it is indicated by a connection line and a status confirmation icon in the center.
        
    
3.  **Expanding Mining Capacity**:
    
    *   **Adding More Racks**: As the player progresses, more GPU racks can be added and linked to boost mining power. These racks are represented visually on the screen, offering a clear indication of how each additional rack impacts the system's overall efficiency and Butcoin production.
        
    *   **Optimizing with Hardware**: Players are encouraged to continually upgrade and link higher-quality GPUs to increase their mining yield and reduce operational inefficiencies.
        
    

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-extension-app-introduction#summary)

Summary:

The _Miner EXT_ page is designed to provide players with total control over their mining hardware. By strategically linking GPU racks, players can maximize their mining efficiency and increase Butcoin accumulation rates. This page gives a comprehensive overview of the current state of the mining network, ensuring that players can make informed decisions to enhance their earnings.

[PreviousMiner App Introduction](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-app-introduction)
[NextDrone App Introduction](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/drone-app-introduction)

Last updated 1 year ago

# Framework settings | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/framework-settings.md)
.

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/framework-settings#integrating-club-into-esx)

Integrating Club into ESX


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Let's go inside the wais-club folder and open the Config.lua file with an editor.

Change the Config.Framework variable in the first lines of the Config file as below.

Copy

    Config.Framework = {
        ["Framework"] = "esx", -- esx, qbcore or qbx
        ["ResourceName"] = "es_extended ", -- es_extended or qb-core or your resource name. If you using qbx you should write qb-core
        ["NewCore"] = true, -- If you use the new core, set this to true ( esx or qb ). If you are using the old one, make it false and edit the event below according to yourself.
        ["SharedEvent"] = "esx:getSharedObject" -- Event name for old cores.
    }

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/framework-settings#integrating-club-into-qbcore)

Integrating Club into QBCore


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Copy

    Config.Framework = {
        ["Framework"] = "qbcore", -- esx, qbcore or qbx
        ["ResourceName"] = "qb-core", -- es_extended or qb-core or your resource name. If you using qbx you should write qb-core
        ["NewCore"] = true, -- If you use the new core, set this to true ( esx or qb ). If you are using the old one, make it false and edit the event below according to yourself.
        ["SharedEvent"] = "qb-core:getSharedObject" -- Event name for old cores.
    }

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/framework-settings#integrating-club-into-qbx)

Integrating Club into Qbx


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If the name of the **core** script is different, replace the value of the `[“ResourceName”]` variable with the script name

`[“ResourceName”] = "your core resources name"`

[PreviousHow to set it up](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/how-to-set-it-up)
[NextAdd / Edit Club Things](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/add-edit-club-things)

Last updated 1 year ago

*   [Integrating Club into QBCore](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/framework-settings#integrating-club-into-qbcore)
    
*   [Integrating Club into Qbx](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-club/framework-settings#integrating-club-into-qbx)
    

Copy

    Config.Framework = {
        ["Framework"] = "qbx", -- esx, qbcore or qbx
        ["ResourceName"] = "qb-core", -- es_extended or qb-core or your resource name. If you using qbx you should write qb-core
        ["NewCore"] = true, -- If you use the new core, set this to true ( esx or qb ). If you are using the old one, make it false and edit the event below according to yourself.
        ["SharedEvent"] = "" -- Event name for old cores.
    }

# Miner App Introduction | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-app-introduction.md)
.

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FAV5VKGUjS24BIOb9Y08X%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D88feb097-555d-4e2a-ba14-fdc1e3c1ebd2&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8616a3ac&sv=2)

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-app-introduction#miner-system-overview)

Miner System Overview

The _Miner System_ page

**Key Sections of the Miner Page:**

1.  **Butcoin Display**:
    
    *   **Current Earnings**: At the top of the page, users can see their current amount of Butcoin mined in real-time. The large number in the center represents the total Butcoin accumulated since the miner was activated.
        
    *   **Mining Rate**: Below the
        
    
2.  **GPU Information**:
    
    *   **Current GPU Speed**: This section
        
    
3.  **Estimated Time**:
    
    *   **Mining Time Calculation**: This
        
    
4.  **Total Balance**:
    
    *   **Cumulative Earnings**: This section displays the player’s to
        
    

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-app-introduction#key-points-of-the-miner-system)

Key Points of the Miner System:

*   **Efficient Mining**: Players must focus on upgrading their GPUs to improve mining efficiency and increase their Butcoin earnings. Higher-performance GPUs allow for faster mining and greater returns.
    
*   **Tracking & Progress**: The page provides comprehensive details, making it easy for players to track their mining operations and earnings at a glance. Players can analyze their setup and make informed decisions on GPU upgrades or replacements.
    
*   **Maintaining GPU Quality**: Players need to be mindful of GPU wear and potential breakdowns. Keeping GPUs in optimal condition ensures consistent Butcoin generation.
    

#### 

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-app-introduction#conclusion)

Conclusion:

The _Miner System_ page serves as a crucial tool for players looking to optimize their digital currency mining operations. It offers a straightforward and informative overview of current earnings, mining speed, and the efficiency of hardware setups. By regularly monitoring this page, players can make strategic choices that maximize their earnings and enhance their in-game activities.

[PreviousDark Store App Introduction](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/page)
[NextMiner Extension App Introduction](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/frkn-resources/frkn-heist-and-ilegal-pack/miner-extension-app-introduction)

# F.A.Q | 0Resmon | 0Resmon

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/llms.txt)
. This page is also available as [Markdown](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q.md)
.

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#open-tv-menu)

Open TV Menu


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Target[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#target)

*   Point the remote at the TV near you and press the “Open TV Menu” button.
    

Command[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#command)

*   If you're near a TV, you can turn it on using /tv.
    

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#change-tv-place-buttons)

Change TV Place Buttons


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

How can i do that?[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#how-can-i-do-that)

*   To do this, go to the **wais-tv/config.lua** file
    
*   Go to the `**Config.PlaceOptions**` table, find the button you want to change, and then replace it with the new key. _The F1–F12 keys and other function keys cannot be used._
    

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#delete-tv-after-player-quit)

Delete TV After Player Quit


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

How can i do that?[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#how-can-i-do-that-1)

*   To do this, go to the **wais-tv/config.lua** file
    
*   Find the `**Config.DeleteTvWhenOwnerQuit = false**` variable and change its value from `false` to `true`.
    
*   Now, when players leave the server after placing one or more televisions, the televisions will be removed.
    

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#job-integration)

Job Integration


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

TV Items[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#tv-items)

*   To do this, go to the **wais-tv/config.lua** file
    
*   Go to the `Config.UsableItems` table and select the TV you want to link to the job as an item.
    
*   Add the following variable to this TV table.
    

*   The final result should look like this:
    

Default TV Jobs/Groups[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#default-tv-jobs-groups)

*   To do this, type the **/tvadmin** command.
    
*   Go to the “Default TV” category and click “**Create TV**”
    
*   After configuring the TV settings, go to the “**Jobs/Groups**” section.
    
*   **Note****:** _**The “Controlable” option must be selected for this.**_
    

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FLQVFelFFeMM43ejnuYQA%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D80eeeb01-6f78-4cf1-9514-da14cce82a55&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=8436e27e&sv=2)

![](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F3505378470-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FmOhVROw9E3kpmAG3JYVe%252Fuploads%252FqY8X4VGtpTp9U6KLxKX5%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Ddcfeb8b1-d8ca-45a2-8f0a-41aaf295bdb0&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=6c79eb38&sv=2)

_**All jobs will be listed in QBCore and Qbox. In ESX, job names must be entered manually.**_

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#change-tv-distance)

Change TV Distance


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **You cannot change** the rendering and video distance for televisions.
    
*   This **data is not defined manually anywhere** in the script; it is **retrieved** automatically **from GTA Base**.
    
*   The rendering area of **televisions is** equal to the **LOD distance**.
    

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#how-can-i-use-tv-items)

How can i use TV Items


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   After adding the TV items to your inventory, equip them.
    
*   After clicking the “Use Item” option, the TV prop will spawn in front of your character.
    
*   **Use the** **W** **key to move along the X, Y, and Z axes.**
    
*   **Use the** **R** **key to adjust the X, Y, and Z rotation around its own axis.**
    
*   Press the E key to complete the process.
    

* * *

There are no more available yet, please open a ticket if the topics here are not suitable for what you are looking for.

* * *

[](https://docs.0resmon.org/0resmon/0resmon-1/wais-resoucres/wais-televisions-and-smarttv/f.a.q#who-developed-it-how-can-i-get-help)

Who developed it / How can I get help


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can recognise our script developers by the short names of the script. Scripts with short name ‘_**Wais**_’ are made by [_**Ayazwai**_](https://ayazwai.dev/)
.

**You can visit our** [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/0resmon)
 **address to ask questions in your mind / To get support**
